title: Recipe metadata completeness check
description: Flags recipes missing 3 or more important optional metadata fields (cuisines, cookingMethods, occasions, seasons, nutritionalDensity, leftovers, pairsWith). These fields improve discoverability and user guidance.
suggestionTemplate: This recipe is missing several metadata fields that improve discoverability and user guidance. Consider adding: cuisines (cultural styles), cookingMethods (techniques used), occasions (when to serve), seasons (when ingredients peak), nutritionalDensity (light/moderate/hearty), leftovers (storage/reuse potential), and pairsWith (complementary recipes).

examples.note: Missing cuisines, seasons, occasions, and pairsWith. Add these for better findability and context.
